@graph.name: POWERFLEX® RV-K
@graph.description: Industrial flexible cable for power transmission. ACCORDING TO: IEC 60502-1 / UNE 21123-2. Powerflex® RV-K cable is suitable for all types of low voltage industrial-type connections, in urban grids, building installations, etc. Its high flexibility makes the installation process substantially easier and, as a result, is particularly suitable for use in difficult layouts.
@graph.category: Hardware > Building Materials > Wiring & Cables > Electrical Cables

audience.audienceType: Electrical Distributors, Electrical Installers, Engineers (Industrial Projects)

subjectOf.name: Technical Datasheet - POWERFLEX® RV-K
subjectOf.description: Complete technical specifications, engineering data and certifications for the cable.

additionalProperty.name: Conductor
additionalProperty.value: Electrolytic annealed copper, class 5 (flexible) according to EN 60228 and IEC 60228

additionalProperty.name: Insulation
additionalProperty.value: Cross-linked polyethylene, type DIX-3 according to HD 603-1 and type XLPE according to IEC 60502-1

additionalProperty.name: Outer Sheath
additionalProperty.value: Flexible PVC, type DMV-18 according to HD 603-1 and type ST2 according to IEC 60502-1

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Service Temperature
additionalProperty.value: -40 (fixed and protected installations)

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Installation Temperature
additionalProperty.value: 0 (on cable surface)

additionalProperty.name: Flame Non-Propagation
additionalProperty.value: Flame non-propagation according to EN 60332-1 / IEC 60332-1

additionalProperty.name: CPR Classification
additionalProperty.value: Eca according to EN 50575

additionalProperty.name: Reduced Halogen Emission
additionalProperty.value: Reduced halogen emission. Chlorine < 15%

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Bending Radius
additionalProperty.value: 5x cable diameter (diameter cable ≤ 50 mm), 6x cable diameter (diameter cable > 50 mm)

additionalProperty.name: Impact Resistance
additionalProperty.value: AG2 Medium severity

additionalProperty.name: Chemical & Oil Resistance
additionalProperty.value: Good

additionalProperty.name: UV Resistance
additionalProperty.value: UV Resistant according to UNE 211605

additionalProperty.name: Water Resistance
additionalProperty.value: AD8 Submersion

additionalProperty.name: Installation Conditions
additionalProperty.value: Open Air, Buried, In conduit, In tray

additionalProperty.name: Standards and Approvals
additionalProperty.value: AENOR, BUREAU VERITAS, RETIE, KEMA-KEUR, RoHS, CE

additionalProperty.name: Typical Applications
additionalProperty.value: Industrial facilities, Urban grids, Building installations, Outdoor lighting

additionalProperty.name: European Stock
additionalProperty.value: Largest European Stock Holding

additionalProperty.name: Manufacturing Quality
additionalProperty.value: As cable manufacturers, we ensure cost-effective premium quality and lasting performance.

additionalProperty.name: Quality Testing
additionalProperty.value: Our in-house labs guarantee rigorous cable quality, reliability, and standards compliance.

additionalProperty.name: Global Logistics
additionalProperty.value: Global cable delivery solutions—expert logistics for seamless supply.

additionalProperty.name: Fast Delivery
additionalProperty.value: Full cable stock, ready for fast delivery- shortest lead times.

additionalProperty.name: Sustainability
additionalProperty.value: EPD-certified cables: Sustainable manufacturing for your Scope 3 success.

additionalProperty.name: Customer Service
additionalProperty.value: Expert, friendly and professional sales team offering a fast & efficient customer service. Global customers are welcome!
